name: tft-traits-web-exploration-tool
description: TFT Traits Web Exploration Tool - Desktop app for exploring optimal TFT board compositions

scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:smoke && npm run lint
scripts.lint: eslint *.js src/renderer/**/*.js src/renderer/**/*.jsx data-engine/*.js data-engine/**/*.js engine/*.js main-process/*.js tools/*.js test/ test/**/*.js
scripts.pack:win: npm run build:renderer && electron-packager . "TFT Board Exploration Tool" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --icon=assets/app-icon.ico --out=dist --overwrite --asar --ignore="^/dist($|/)" --ignore="^/\.git($|/)" --ignore="^/\.appdata($|/)" --ignore="^/tools/node($|/)" --ignore="\.log$"
